input:
Design Review — Dashboard Redesign — April 4, 2026
Presenter: Designer Nora Kim
Reviewers: Jake Torres (Frontend), Priya Patel (Product)

Nora presented three mockup variants for the Analytics Dashboard.

Decisions:
1. Variant B selected (clean minimal layout). Decision maker: Priya.
2. Mobile-first approach adopted. Breakpoint: 768px.
3. Color palette: use existing brand tokens from design system v2.3.
4. Accessibility target: WCAG 2.1 AA.
5. Handoff to Jake by April 11 for implementation sprint starting April 14.

Open items:
- Dark mode: deferred to v2 (owner: Nora, after June 1)
